commands.repair_reason: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because there are no concrete code defects; the remaining action is normal maintainer review of a draft build-script PR.; Cleared: The diff only changes local build command invocation in build.ps1 and adds no dependency, secret, permission, download, or publishing behavior. (sha=98a247c30f2bdf9d8349b7fffa055df61996bbda)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `Invoke-DotNetCaptured` helper in `build.ps1` and routes `dotnet build` through an argument array so captured stderr does not control build success handling.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible, but not runtime-reproduced here: current main uses `$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"` with assigned `dotnet build ... 2>&1` output, the PowerShell pattern the PR avoids. This read-only Linux checkout did not run Windows PowerShell validation.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because there are no concrete code defects; the remaining action is normal maintainer review of a draft build-script PR.

target.title: fix(build): capture dotnet stderr without aborting
target.body:
## Summary
- capture `dotnet build` output through an argument-array helper so native stderr does not trip PowerShell `$ErrorActionPreference = Stop`
- keep `$LASTEXITCODE` as the build success/failure source of truth

## Validation
- fresh Azure normal Windows validation: `./build.ps1` passed
- fresh Azure normal Windows validation: built and ran `OpenClaw.Shared.Tests` with `--no-restore` after an explicit test-project build; command exited 0
- fresh Azure normal Windows validation: built and ran `OpenClaw.Tray.Tests` with `--no-restore`; 976 passed
- final Azure Windows WSL2 smoke: POSIX sync/exec, `git`, `rsync`, WSLInterop, PowerShell bridge, and `wsl.exe --list --verbose` passed
- final Azure native Windows smoke: PowerShell, Git, hostname, sync/exec passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
target.author: vincentkoc
